title: Pan-Seared Halibut with Poke Glaze
description: A simple yet flavorful halibut dish with a sweet and savory poke glaze. Perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Season the halibut fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the garlicky butter in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the halibut for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the halibut to a baking sheet and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked to your liking.
Meanwhile, mix the poke sauce and maple syrup in a small saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat and cook until slightly thickened.
Brush the poke glaze over the halibut during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Serve the halibut with the aerated rice and garnish with parsley.
